body:
Chloe, it was great connecting with you last week — I've been thinking a lot about what [CarbonLedger](carbonledger.co) is building and I keep coming back to how cleanly the product sits at the intersection of regulatory compliance pressure and corporate net-zero commitments. At [Halfway Capital](halfway.vc), we're actively leaning into this space at the seed and Series A stage, and your approach to on-chain carbon accounting feels differentiated in a way that's hard to dismiss. I'd love to schedule a deeper technical and commercial diligence call, ideally with your co-founder present if that works. Could you share your latest deck and any pilot data or LOIs you have ahead of that conversation? I'm generally free Thursday or Friday afternoon next week, but happy to find something that works on your end.

Amara
